title: messages: deserialize_profile_fields missing; crate fails to compile
description: Profile variant in ClearMessage references deserialize_profile_fields via #[serde(deserialize_with = ...)] at core/src/messages.rs:37, but this function is never defined anywhere in the codebase. cargo check produces E0425 (cannot find function). The entire nie-core crate fails to build. Trigger: any cargo build or cargo test invocation. Root cause: the fix agent for nie-t8j0.2 wired up the custom deserializer attribute but never wrote the function body.
